generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance PointCloudDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks from Kalman filter tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic for performance class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing ego vehicle state and object track timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC logic to cloud-based DT for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionResult, SpeedComputationResult
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI-based commands for ACC control, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of ego vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of detected object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of projected driving path for ADAS decisions"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generated for developers to troubleshoot during development"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected lead vehicle position and speed for ACC"
]

instance SpeedComputationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed desired speed for ACC"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI-based command for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI-based command for desired speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI-based command for emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator adjusting steering angles"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntityFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on Jetson devices for vehicle control"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntityFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed in cloud for computation offloading"
]

instance UserEntityFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on separate UI devices for interaction"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE handling inter-entity communication"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntityFE, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelD435iDepthCamera, EgoVehicleSpeedSensor, EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, DataTranslationFE
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntityFE
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntityFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC-generated desired speed commands, emergency braking instructions, and ACC enable/disable signals from the Digital Twin Entity to the PT's motor and steering actuators via ROS2, with the Actuation FE converting control signals into voltage commands for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with maximum 100 ms end-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity (per R7) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across components (per R8), aligned with 3GPP TS 22.185 V2V communication requirements for safety-critical systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated ISO 23247 reference architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (cloud-based processing), and User Entity (UI interfaces), connected via ROS2 for intra-entity and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, where Data Translation FE handles protocol alignment and data serialization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operates during design phase (cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation) and operational phase (real-time optimization and health monitoring), covering both 'as designed' (simulation-based development) and 'as operated' (live vehicle control) representation phases of the physical counterpart."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 performance class I requirements (no road curvature capabilities) for 1/10-scale vehicle constraints; fidelity validated through latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms) compliance; no explicit uncertainty quantification or verification methods detailed beyond safety-critical system adherence."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication between components on vehicle hardware; Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity; exact protocols (e.g., UDP/TCP) unspecified beyond ROS2 middleware and Wi-Fi infrastructure."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson NX/Orin Nano hardware; Digital Twin Entity hosted in cloud for computation offloading; User Entity and Data Storage deployed on external devices separate from the vehicle; all components synchronized via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture for digital twin manufacturing framework adapted for automotive use; ACC functionality implemented per ISO 15622 performance class I specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "System designed for safety-critical operation with 100 ms latency and synchronization requirements; no specific cybersecurity protocols or safety mechanisms (e.g., fail-safes for remote operations) detailed beyond general adherence to safety-critical system principles."
]
